chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Rev. Application No.S-40 of 2016 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 30-05-2019 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, D.P.G..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. Same was the position on the last two dates of hearing. It appears that after filing this Criminal Revision Application, the applicant has lost interest, therefore, the same is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
